pages.metaTitle: Retail - social.plus for the Retail industry
pages.metaDescription: Transform browsing into shared discovery with shoppable content, real customer stories, and an in-app community that returns.
pages.content:
# Turn your retail app into a community customers return to
Transform browsing into shared discovery with shoppable content, real customer stories, and in-app community.
## The retail problem isn’t traffic. It’s retention.
### Acquisition costs keep rising while customer loyalty keeps falling. Your users browse, buy once, and disappear.
Acquisition is expensive
CPMs and CPCs climb every quarter – but customers still churn after the first purchase.
Engagement happens everywhere except your app
Shoppers scroll inspiration on TikTok and Instagram, not with you.
Zero-party data is disappearing
Without community interactions, it's harder to learn what customers actually like.
Content and commerce are disconnected
You showcase products – but not the stories, creators, or community that influence purchases.
## From inspiration to purchase, all in one flow
## Build a vibrant in-app shopping community
Turn static product browsing into a dynamic experience with UGC, product tagging, live updates, and creator content.
## Unlock zero-party insights that no pixel can give you
Learn what shoppers want directly from their behavior.
## Your own white-label retail media channel
Drive incremental revenue with branded content that lives directly inside your customer journey.
## Use cases that turn browsing into buying
## Shoppable Feed
Let users explore real outfits, product drops, and reviews created by other shoppers.
## Product Discovery Groups
Create hubs for beauty, fashion, home décor, skincare, streetwear, and more.
## Influencer Profiles
Give influencers a home inside your app that turn followers into fans.
## Livestream Shopping
Host product demos, Q&As, and flash sales with chat-powered interaction.
## Product Showcase Clips
Let customers share outfit inspiration, unboxings, and tips through short-form video.
## Customer Reviews
Bring authenticity into every product page with UGC pulled from your community.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
UGC, reactions, comments, and rich media.
## Groups & Forums
Topic-driven discovery.
## Messaging & Chat
Customer-to-customer or customer-to-brand.
## Livestreams
Interactive video with real-time reactions.
## User Profiles
Rich shopper identities.
## Shoppable UGC
Product tagging that links directly to PDPs.
## Moderation Tools
For safe, brand-friendly conversations.
## Analytics & Insights
Engagement tracking and sentiment analysis.
## Trusted by leading retail brands
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.

pages.metaTitle: Fitness - social.plus for the Fitness industry
pages.metaDescription: Boost motivation, retention, and lifetime value through in-app social features that inspire progress and connection.
pages.content:
# Turn your app into an active community
Boost motivation, retention, and lifetime value through in-app social features that inspire progress and connection.
## The challenge isn’t sign-ups. It’s consistency.
### Your users start strong, but without connection, most drop off after a few weeks.
Motivation fades fast
Once users stop seeing results, churn follows.
Communities live elsewhere
Your users discuss progress on Reddit or Facebook instead of your app.
Limited personalization
Without social data, workouts and content stay generic.
Retention drops post-goal
When challenges end, users leave — instead of discovering new goals or peers.
## The fitness engagement playbook
## Build a motivational community
Turn isolated workouts into shared achievements.
## Analyze user intent and progress
Collect behavioral and emotional insights that predict churn and identify advocates.
## Turn engagement into new revenue
Empower creators, coaches, and wellness brands to reach engaged users authentically.
## Key in-app use cases for fitness & wellness
## Progress Feed
Let users share workouts, photos, and milestones – fueling motivation across the community.
## Nutrition & Wellness Groups
Bring together people with shared goals – plant-based diets, sleep tracking, mindfulness.
## Coach Profiles
Connect members directly with verified coaches through posts, chat, and livestreams.
## Workout Livestreams
Host interactive training sessions with real-time reactions and shout-outs.
## Workout Clips
Share workout highlights, daily check-ins, or transformation moments in short-form video.
## Goal Journals & Streaks
Encourage consistency through daily check-ins and progress badges.
## Build quickly with modern, developer-friendly SDKs
## Activity Feed
Share posts, media, reactions, and progress logs.
## Groups & Forums
Themed fitness communities and goal-based rooms.
## Messaging & Chat
Connect coaches and members through chat.
## Livestreams
Real-time classes and motivation sessions.
## User Profiles
Custom avatars, bios, and achievements.
## Stories & Clips
Share bite-sized workout stories and clips.
## Moderation Tools
Safe and supportive environment.
## Analytics & Insights
Track engagement, progress, and intent.
## Trusted by leading fitness brands
Everything to engage. Nothing to rebuild.
### Start with one component or roll out the full suite — all features are modular, embeddable, and battle-tested.
